title: Gavi's Recovery Update
text: His return now expected no earlier than March according to sources like Mundo Deportivo ...
fullText: Gavi's injury was initially expected to last until January-February. Gavi is currently undergoing a rehabilitation process and as reported by a number of reputable media outlets, including Mundo Deportivo, Gavi will miss the entire months of January and February and will not return until March. This has not yet been confirmed by the club and the club will announce the reality in the near future.

title: Ciutat Esportiva Private Visit
text: Gavi and his father were seen in Ciutat Esportiva for Gavi's recovery...
fullText: Gavi and his father were seen in Ciutat Esportiva. On November 3, fans noticed Gavis coming with his father and his father was at the wheel. Gavi continues his recovery and visits Ciutat Esportiva frequently. Let's wish Gavi a speedy recovery and hope that these injuries don't hinder him in the future and that he regains his best form, which we saw in 2022-23. Gavi is a very important link in the current Barcelona team. Many consider him the heart of Barcelona. Health to you, warrior!

title: Inside Barça Dressing Room
text: Teammates react to Gavi's return timeline and ...
fullText: Teammates react to Gavi's return timeline and first is Hansi Flick, who tells us about Gavi. 'I think it's always good to think and talk about how Gavi could have helped us, but that's not an option now. His character, his attitude, his mentality... he's exceptional in every way. When he comes back, I'll be very happy. But now we just have to wait.' Here are some of the lines from Hansi Flick's interview about Gavi. The team-mates were also in shock and are eagerly awaiting Gavi's return.

title: GaviHugeFan is back
fullText: Instagram restored GaviHugeFan account again! Why again, because it is not first time Instagram disables and restores account. It is ridiculous and Instagram completely affects account as they disabled account twice in 3 days. The reason was action of automation as Instagram uses automatic system to check lots of pages. And, unfortunately, our page was not exception. Anyways, we will always comeback and will not disappoint you. We still have many work to accomplish. Support us by following account.

title: Two years already since crucial injury
text: On November 19 will be 2 years since Gavi's crucial injury...
fullText: On November 19 it is 2 years since Gavi's crucial injury he received in a match against Georgia when there was no necessity for Gavi to play that match as Spain has already gathered all important points and qualified for Euro 2024. But Spain boss, Luis de la Fuente had other plans and wanted Gavi's participation in unnecessary match! Gavi played only 26 minutes, match was in Spain. But Gavi received the main pain before 26th minute and de la Fuente saw and decided Gavi to continue playing. But then our warrior could not stand the pain and medical staff took him off the field. Since that Gavi had knee operation and missed totally 336 days.

title: Barça vs Elche: Preview
text: Tactical expectations ahead of the upcoming La Liga clash...
fullText: Tactical expectations ahead of the upcoming La Liga clash. Gavi's injury should last during February, so he is expected to join Flick's tactical expectations and start to have first minutes on the pitch. First match, as it expects, will be against Elche, it is a home match, so it could be real for Gavi to participate without travelling. But, it is still unconfirmed, as club needs to see Gavi's recovery updates and also get medical's green light.

title: New milestone is set
text: GaviHugeFan instagram account expects 100k followers until...
fullText: GaviHugeFan instagram account expects 100k followers until next Autumn. As admins can make data statistical predictions, account is getting new 80-100 followers daily on average. So it means, during next winter, spring and summer, followers statistics will be surely increased to 200-300 and account can hit 100k during next autumn. It is possible, let's make it! Follow account as there we post fresh news in every hour!

title: Gavi will miss match
text: As expected Gavi will miss upcoming match...
fullText: As expected Gavi will miss upcoming match vs Athletic Bilbao that will be hold in new stadium: Spotify Camp Nou in front of 50 thousand fans. Gavi will miss whole winter until final recovery. It means he will miss also Supercopa matches in Saudi Arabia, but there is possibility he can attend the tournament to support his team, but no confirmation. It is also depends on crutches as Gavi is unable to walk without them.

title: Squad Injury Report
text: Several players continue individualized recovery sessions...
fullText: Several players continue individualized recovery sessions as Gavi is not the one that has injury. It is real that Gavi needs more period for recovery than other players, but here is list of injured players: Pedri Gonzalez, Lamine Yamal, Marc andre ter Stegen, Joan Garcia and Marc Casado. But they all will be back sooner than Pablo.

title: Gavi & Ana
text: Late night walk with Ana and...
fullText: Late night walk with Ana and crutches. Yes, Gavi is still unable to walk without crutches. Gavi published a story where shows the picture above with Ana Pelayoz, who is his girlfriend. Couple had a night walk across Barcelona streets. Follow our instagram to get news faster than others!

title: Gavi's relative celebrates happy birthday
text: Gavi's aunt Almudener Gavira celebrated her birthday...
fullText: Gavi's aunt Almudener Gavira celebrated her birthday on November 15. Our team is wishing her and her family a happy birthday. Wishing much success in life, happiness, a stable and healthy family, and lots of strength. Loving their family very much!

title: Fan Account Milestone
fullText: GaviHugeFan hits 27000 subscribers. Yes, it became reality and we hit 27000 so fast as expected. Every day our community becomes more and more huge and we are very thankful to all of you. Our family is increasing...

title: Gavi still can not walk
text: Another photo showed us Gavi is still with...
fullText: Another photo showed us Gavi is still with crutches. On November 16, Gavi published a story with Ana Pelayoz and showed he is still with crutches. Before that we saw it, when Gavi posted pictures on instagram, where he attended newly renovated Nou Camp stadium and with crutches. We hope, he will get healthy as soon as possible, as we all miss him seeing on the pitch and fighting for every ball. Warrior, we are impatiently waiting!

title: 433 reposted Gavi & Lamine
text: Gavi's and Lamine's funny videos are reposted by...
fullText: Gavi's and Lamine's funny videos are reposted by 433 instagram group. Gavi and Lamine continue teasing each other by posting faces with ridiculous effects on them. This duo has a strong chemistry. 433 instagram could not resist and reposted their videos on their instagram page and boys liked that post!

title: Gavi's comeback match
text: Right now Gavi is expected to be back for match vs...
fullText: Right now Gavi is expected to be back for match vs Elche. But, this is still unofficial, as Gavi continue his recovery and it can be earlier or later. We hope, he will be fully recovered as soon as possible and gets his teammates and balls. Now, the match Gavi will appear, is the home match against Elche. We will wait for more information.

title: Stadium's comeback day
text: Club is officially anounced will be back to Camp Nou for next match...
fullText: Club is officially anounced will be back to Camp Nou for next match. Yes finally governmental officials gave green light for FC Barcelona to come and have a match in newly renovated stadium. Last goal is scored by Pablo Gavi in Nou Camp, where Barca was playing against Mallorca and Gavi shot a banger. He assisted to Fati also in that match. How I wanted Gavi to be first goal scorer in new Camp Nou, but it is totally impossible as Gavi has to miss whole winter because of his injury.

title: Gavi has new photos
text: Gavi shared new pictures on tiktok. Gavi has recently opened tiktok account and started to use his free time in a smart way. He posted new pictures there, and pictures you can see by following our instagram account. We posted all pictures there.
fullText: Gavi shared new pictures on tiktok...

title: Expectation date
fullText: Account expects 30000 followers until the end of year. As statistics showed, page accepts 80-100 new followers daily on average. Now are family borders are reached to 27500 followers, so 30000 is not far and until the end of year is expected to be increased by 2500.
